description_long: This is a pair of open-toed sandals featuring a combination of black and brown materials with prominent neon green laces and decorative gray elements on the upper front. The sandals have a flat, slightly contoured sole that appears to be made of a flexible, cushioned material, likely rubber or foam, with a brown finish. The upper consists of black straps that wrap around the heel and across the foot, providing support and structure. The neon green laces are looped and tied on the top, adding a striking visual accent, while the gray decorative patches give the sandals a unique, handcrafted look. The interior footbed shows some discoloration, suggesting moderate use. Overall, the sandals have a casual, urban style suitable for everyday wear in city environments.
description: A pair of open-toed, black and brown sandals with neon green laces and gray decorative patches, showing signs of moderate use. The sandals feature flat soles and a casual, urban design.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing both sandals, highlighting the neon green laces and gray decorative patches on the upper front.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view emphasizing the heel straps and the flat, brown soles, with the laces and decorations partially visible.
description_view_2: Back view focusing on the heel area and the curvature of the soles, with minimal visibility of the laces and decorations.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the profile of the sandals, the black straps, and the full length of the neon green laces and gray patches.
